## Description

<!-- Briefly describe the change and why it's needed. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] chore: maintenance, tooling, dependencies
- [ ] refactor: code restructuring (no functional change)
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] test: test additions or fixes

## How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran or the manual verification steps. -->

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] E2E tests
- [ ] Manual testing

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing code style and conventions
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented complex logic or non-obvious decisions
- [ ] Lint and type checks pass locally (`npm run lint && npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] New and existing tests pass
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if needed

<!-- Assess the impact of this change on financial calculations, data accuracy, and security. -->

- **Financial calculations affected?** Yes / No <!-- If yes, describe how and what safeguards are in place -->
- **Data migration required?** Yes / No
- **Security or privacy implications?** Yes / No <!-- If yes, describe -->
